title: OREGON YOUTH AUTHORITY - 211info
text: OREGON YOUTH AUTHORITY OREGON YOUTH AUTHORITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Oregon Youth Authority (OYA) is responsible for the supervision, management, and administration of youth correctional facilities, state juvenile parole and probation services, community out-of-home placements for youth in custody, and other functions related to state programs for juvenile justice. 530 Center Street NE Suite 500 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Call for information Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 373-7205 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 373-7205 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corner of Center and High Streets Services: Juvenile Detention Facilities Parole * Juvenile Offenders Probation * Juvenile Offenders Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FOSTER PROCTOR HOMES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON YOUTH AUTHORITY
